% Auto-generated table of contents. It is populated from the \section{...}
% commands in the slide files that are \input in main.tex -- add, remove, or
% reorder a \section and this list updates itself on the next compile.
%
% Note: like any LaTeX ToC, it reads the .toc file from the *previous* run,
% so a fresh build needs two compiles to show the latest sections.
% ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
\begin{frame}[t]{Agenda}
\tableofcontents
\end{frame}
